info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 5.9 DuY ityatra 'dIrGAnto'pyayam' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'asme devAso'vaDUnutA vasu' (f0 106614) he devA noBi vasu prerayata yaTA PalinaH pAdapo vAtAdinA kampito'vapAtayati PalAni taTA kurutetyarTaH
'apetya patriByo'vaDUnotyavaDUtamiti' (kA0 SrO0 242) kfzRAjinamavaDUnoti tallagnaM DUlyAdikaM kfzRAjinakampanena utkare pAtayatItyarTaH
'gavAGrAtamavaDUtamavakzutam' (annam) (manu0 5125) avaDUtam padAvaDUtaM padApasAritam yo vilaNGyASramAnsarvAnAtmanyeva sTitaH pumAn ativarRASramI yogI avaDUtaH sa ucyate..
'avaDUtavezaH' (BA0 pu0 11925) saMnyastavastraH parErBuktoBitAni vA jIrRAni vasanAni yo vaste sa taToktaH
'pApam… avaDUya… gacCema svargamuttamam' (BA0 vana0 5220) kampaneneva parAsUya parAkftyetyarTaH ruciro'vaDUnoteH prayogaH
'avaDUya rasAlamaYjarIrGanamAdAya parAgamaYjasA' (pArijAta0 1136) avapUrvasyApi DUY iha SudDe DAtvarTe prayogaH na tUpacarite tiraskArArTe avaDUya Izad DUtvA (DavitvA)
'Anahyate yasya viDUpyate ca pApacyate klidyati cApi nAsA' (suSruta0 236910) viDUpyate bAzpAyate
'parogavyUti hotavyastaTA hEnaM na vyavaDUnute' (kAWaka0 3711) avaDUnotItyarTaH nArTo vinA
'tAni bARasahasrARi carmaRA vyavaDUya' (hari0 3112) vyavaDUya=pratyasya pratikzipya parasparajYAH saMhfzwA vyaDUtAH suniScitAH
'api paYcASataM SUrA mfdnanti mahatIM camUm' (BA0 BIzma0 38283).. vyavaDUtA dArAdizvanAsaktAH
'antarIkzAd vinirDUtAstasya vegena rAkzasAH BUmO nipatitAH…' (rA0 61689) vinirDUtAH parAkziptA utsAritAH parARunnAH
'ADunvanto vA pibantaSca toyam' (SvAnaH) (va0 bf0 saM0 8810) ADunvantaScalayantaH pucCam
'ADUtAn Andolya prakziptAn ye yajYe DuvanaM tanvate' (Sa0 brA0 141332) DavitreRa mArutaM prerayanti
